description: GTO continuation bet frequencies and sizing guidelines by position and board texture

dry_boards.rationale: IP has significant range advantage on dry boards; small frequent bets are optimal

medium_texture.description: One draw possible, semi-connected (e.g., Qs9h4d, Kh8h3c)
medium_texture.rationale: Balanced sizing; some draws in range but still favorable for aggressor

wet_boards.description: Flush draw + straight draw possible (e.g., JhTh7c, 9s8s6d)
wet_boards.rationale: Need to charge draws; check more often with marginal hands

monotone_boards.rationale: Range advantage diminished; many hands check for pot control

dry_boards.rationale: OOP c-bets less frequently due to positional disadvantage

wet_boards.rationale: OOP strength check-raises; c-bet only with strong made hands or nut draws

ip_after_cbet.blank_turn: Continue betting with same sizing if turn doesn't change dynamic
ip_after_cbet.scare_card: Bet 50-66% pot with strong hands; check with marginal showdown value
ip_after_cbet.completing_draw: Check-evaluate with bluffs; value bet thinly with sets+

oop_after_cbet.notes: OOP double-barrels are polarized: value or strong semi-bluffs only

river_value.thin_value_threshold: Bet river for value with hands beating >55% of opponent's calling range
